title: Dimensional Wells
description: Adds dimensional wells that convert blocks & items into their dimensional variants
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d38d95ec439cfa5360ba2fa34999f12a413c614d.png)

# Description

Adds a **Sculk, Nether and End well** that allows players to convert items and blocks into their dimensional counterparts
For example throw Stone in the Nether Well to turn it into Blackstone

![All 3 wells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22e90ae425ace84a741644a0b13cc7aca9af7aab.png)

However not all items have a 100% chance to be converted, some crafts might turn the thrown item into thin air

![Destroyed item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b20958f6cc2d937f82a488831dc19d7e95932a48.gif)

**All conversion recipes and their chances can be configured in the config file, as well as completly disabling the item destruction mechanic**

# Crafting

**Sculk Well**

![Sculk Well craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8d68dbed962cf2c88d9077181c8fd1338f608d4.png)

**Nether Well**

![Nether Well craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fdf8ad87914ab311d54fc3c6c2eaadc77289c6c.png)

**End Well**

![End Well craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6807533ee5195d9174c205debaef300a81a056c.png)

# Conversions
**Sculk Well Conversions**

- Amethyst Shard -> Echo Shard (70%)  
- Quartz -> Amethyst Shard (70%)  
- Moss -> Sculk (80%)  
- Dirt -> Moss (30%)  
- Sweet Berry -> Glow Berry (75%)  
- Vines -> Glow Lichen (75%)  
- Glass -> Tinted Glass (25%)  
- Cobblestone -> Cobbled Deepslate (100%)  
- Stone -> Deepslate (100%)  
- Stone Bricks -> Deepslate Bricks (100%)  

**Nether Well Conversions**

- Amethyst Shard -> Quartz (100%)  
- Redstone -> Glowstone Dust (50%)  
- Crying Obsidian -> Obsidian (100%)  
- Obsidian -> Crying Obsidian (40%)  
- Fungus <-> Mushroom (70%)  
- Sand -> Soul Sand (50%)  
- Slimeball -> Magma Cream (50%)  
- Gravel -> Magma Block (40%)  
- Flame -> Soul Flame (90%)  
- Rose Bush -> Wither Rose (10%)  
- Bricks -> Nether Bricks (100%)  
- Cobblestone -> Blackstone (100%)  
- Stone -> Polished Blackstone (100%)  
- Stone Bricks -> Polished Blackstone Bricks (100%)  

**End Well Conversions**

- Torch -> End Rod (30%)  
- Apple -> Chorus Fruit (70%)  
- Water Bottle -> Dragon’s Breath (100%)  
- Nautilus Shell -> Shulker Shell (80%)  
- Cobblestone/Stone -> Endstone (100%)  
- Quartz Block -> Purpur Block (100%)
